description: A formal piece of correspondence or notice sent by an insurance provider regarding policy changes, claim updates, or billing notifications.

insurance_provider.instruction: The official name of the insurance company or provider issuing the letter.

recipient_name.instruction: The full name of the policyholder, claimant, or individual to whom the letter is addressed.

letter_date.instruction: The date the letter or notice was officially issued.

policy_number.instruction: The insurance policy or member identification number referenced in the text.

claim_number.instruction: The specific claim reference number mentioned, if the letter is regarding an ongoing or closed insurance claim.

subject_line.instruction: The title, subject line, or main heading summarizing the purpose of the letter (e.g., Notice of Cancellation, Claim Update).

action_required_date.instruction: Any specific deadline or date by which the recipient must respond or take action, if mentioned in the text.
